sample_response.headline: Senior Machine Learning Engineer | GenAI & MLOps | Scalable AI Platforms
sample_response.about:
I am a Machine Learning Engineer specializing in production-grade ML and Generative AI systems, with experience building, deploying, and scaling AI services on AWS.

Currently at Wolters Kluwer, I work on ML services that power large-scale document and invoice automation platforms used by accountants across Europe. My work spans the full ML lifecycle—from model experimentation and analysis to cloud-native deployment, CI/CD, and reliable inference APIs.

My core strengths include:

* Designing and operating ML inference services using FastAPI and AWS (ECR, Lambda, EventBridge)
* Building MLOps pipelines for model analysis, rollout, and monitoring
* Working with Generative AI and LLM-based systems for document understanding and automation
* Developing performant ML solutions for both cloud and edge environments

Previously, I worked on edge AI and computer vision systems, including CUDA-accelerated pipelines and custom multi-object tracking for real-time deployments.

I enjoy working on problems where AI meets real-world constraints—latency, cost, scalability, and reliability—and I am motivated by shipping models that deliver measurable business impact.

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: Senior Machine Learning Engineer | GenAI & MLOps | Scalable AI Platforms

experience.description:
Basecone is a platform used by accountants to automate the processing of invoice documents. I am part of the team responsible for developing and maintaining the machine learning services of the platform, which bring automation to the document processing.

My role in the team involves:
1. Built and maintained AWS-based ML infrastructure (ECR, Lambda, EventBridge) supporting production inference workloads.
2. Designed FastAPI-based ML services for real-time document processing
3. Implemented CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions) for automated model deployment and rollback
4. Developed pipelines for model evaluation, analysis, and controlled rollout
5. Contributed to scaling ML systems used in invoice automation for accounting workflows

1. Responsible for AI firmware development for custom Jetson SOMs.
2. Generative AI model using Stable Diffusion and Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide pool options based on user prompts.
3. Researched and developed a CUDA Accelerated GStreamer Pipeline to improve performance by 80%.
4. Developed a cutting-edge custom multi-object detection and tracking algorithm tailored for edge devices by integrating data inputs from diverse sources.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: AI for a Smarter Physical World
receivedRecommendations.description: Working with Rahul has been a pleasure. His expertise in neural network model development, deployment, and optimization, particularly in vision models, has been instrumental in delivering our product to the market quicker. His strong communication combined with his collaborative spirit, have consistently made him an invaluable asset to our team.

receivedRecommendations.givenBy: Samir Chowdhary Thakur Das ( समीर चौधरी ठाकुर दास )
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: August 16, 2019, Samir Chowdhary Thakur Das managed Rahul directly
receivedRecommendations.description: Rahul worked with us in the capacity of software developer. He leveraged his skills as consultant to discuss and understand concerns of client. He further helped us with requirement gathering, designing database and was actively involved in web development. His skills are highly impressive and he is a quick learner. He is good team player with blend of niche technical skills, and he never misses out any opportunity to take initiatives. I'll have no hesitation in recommending him for any project.
